author: Minh
tmdl_source:
createOrReplace

	model Model
		culture: en-US
		defaultPowerBIDataSourceVersion: powerBI_V3
		sourceQueryCulture: en-US
		dataAccessOptions
			legacyRedirects
			returnErrorValuesAsNull

		table Production
			lineageTag: 7e58ab51-d401-423d-95a2-91e41e98c8ce

			column Month
				dataType: dateTime
				formatString: Long Date
				lineageTag: d0679683-526e-4615-88c9-b35fbb7a2026
				summarizeBy: none
				sourceColumn: Month

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

				annotation UnderlyingDateTimeDataType = Date

			column Origin
				dataType: string
				lineageTag: 9a7866db-8101-426d-8854-7f80531f3974

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			column Plant
				dataType: string
				lineageTag: 580b4c53-7e98-4af0-98bb-613137ba323d

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			column Section
				dataType: string
				lineageTag: 8955b083-1090-4780-bc28-660305ab81a5

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			column Value
				dataType: double
				lineageTag: be723822-1d0b-4190-80c1-165e0d260efe
				summarizeBy: sum
				sourceColumn: Value

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			column 'CK Conversion -> RCN Kg''s'
				dataType: double
				lineageTag: 9d6a096d-9b38-4c8c-9fe4-9f036c61861c
				summarizeBy: sum
				sourceColumn: CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			column 'Rate merge'
				dataType: double
				lineageTag: a769a528-5d6a-4de3-aef3-451d2911a133
				summarizeBy: sum
				sourceColumn: Rate merge

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			partition Production = m
				mode: import
				source =
						let
						    Source = Excel.Workbook(File.Contents("C:\Users\minh.cao\OneDrive - INTERSNACK CASHEW COMPANY PTE LTD\Desktop\Copy of Origin wise cost Dashboard.xlsx"), null, true),
						    Production_Sheet = Source{[Item="Production",Kind="Sheet"]}[Data],
						    #"Transposed Table" = Table.Transpose(Production_Sheet),
						    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(#"Transposed Table", each ([Column4] <> "CK Conversion -> RCN") and ([Column6] <> null and [Column6] <> "ISP Packed" and [Column6] <> "UPW Packed")),
						    #"Transposed Table1" = Table.Transpose(#"Filtered Rows"),
						    #"Removed Top Rows" = Table.Skip(#"Transposed Table1",5),
						    #"Filtered Rows1" = Table.SelectRows(#"Removed Top Rows", each ( [Column1] <> "-" )),
						    #"Promoted Headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(#"Filtered Rows1", [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
						    #"Removed Other Columns" = Table.SelectColumns(#"Promoted Headers",{"Month", "Origin", "Location", "Calibration", "Steaming", "MC Shelling", "Borma", "MC Peeling", "Hand Peeling", "MC Grading", "Manual Grading"}),
						    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Removed Other Columns",{{"Month", type date}, {"Origin", type text}, {"Location", type text}, {"Calibration", Int64.Type}, {"Steaming", Int64.Type}, {"MC Shelling", Int64.Type}, {"Borma", type number}, {"MC Peeling", type number}, {"Hand Peeling", type number}, {"MC Grading", type number}, {"Manual Grading", type number}}),
						    #"Unpivoted Other Columns" = Table.UnpivotOtherColumns(#"Changed Type", {"Month", "Origin", "Location"}, "Section", "Value"),
						    #"Replaced Value" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Unpivoted Other Columns","Vietnam","VietNam",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Origin"}),
						    #"Replaced Value1" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Replaced Value","Ivc","IVC",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Origin"}),
						    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Replaced Value1",{{"Location", "Plant"}}),
						    #"Appended Query" = Table.Combine({#"Renamed Columns", Packing}),
						    #"Merged Queries" = Table.NestedJoin(#"Appended Query", {"Section", "Origin"}, #"Ref_CK Convertions RCN 1", {"CK Convertions RCN", "Origin"}, "Ref_CK Convertions RCN", JoinKind.LeftOuter),
						    #"Expanded Ref_CK Convertions RCN" = Table.ExpandTableColumn(#"Merged Queries", "Ref_CK Convertions RCN", {"Value"}, {"Rate"}),
						    #"Merged Queries1" = Table.NestedJoin(#"Expanded Ref_CK Convertions RCN", {"Plant", "Section", "Origin"}, #"Ref_CK Convertions RCN 2", {"Plant", "Section", "Origin"}, "Ref_CK Convertions RCN 2", JoinKind.LeftOuter),
						    #"Expanded Ref_CK Convertions RCN 2" = Table.ExpandTableColumn(#"Merged Queries1", "Ref_CK Convertions RCN 2", {"Value"}, {"Value.1"}),
						    #"Added Conditional Column" = Table.AddColumn(#"Expanded Ref_CK Convertions RCN 2", "Rate merge", each if [Rate] <> null then [Rate] else [Value.1]),
						    #"Removed Columns" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Added Conditional Column",{"Rate", "Value.1"}),
						    #"Added Custom" = Table.AddColumn(#"Removed Columns", "CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's", each [Value]*[Rate merge]),
						    #"Changed Type1" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Added Custom",{{"CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's", type number}, {"Rate merge", Percentage.Type}})
						in
						    #"Changed Type1"

			annotation PBI_NavigationStepName = Navigation

			annotation PBI_ResultType = Table

		table Dim_Origin
			lineageTag: c1b96f9e-d27c-44f8-a0aa-d1b16b8bf69a

			column ID
				dataType: int64

				sourceColumn: Origin
				sortByColumn: ID

				changedProperty = SortByColumn

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			partition Dim_Origin = m
				mode: import
				source =
						let
						    Source = Table.FromRows(Json.Document(Binary.Decompress(Binary.FromText("Nc49D4JADAbg/9KZwRM/VxmIi4uG5cJQQ4ON0ks4HfTX2xbY+jT3Xt8YIUABFQ731DFCW0RY6+LEOePHWSrPTeXzRuf6gTI93KpuKD+UObmzJAmLa6+6klCPL/fBDiXB5/h1H9UN01twcIeVXZIuCeX5w2Dlai232LpduKdxWZRTxtj+AQ==", BinaryEncoding.Base64), Compression.Deflate)), let _t = ((type nullable text) meta [Serialized.Text = true]) in type table [ID = _t, Origin = _t]),
						    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Source,{{"ID", Int64.Type}, {"Origin", type text}})
						in
						    #"Changed Type"

			annotation PBI_NavigationStepName = Navigation

			annotation PBI_ResultType = Table

		table _measure
			lineageTag: 00dceb5f-772b-4eaa-b123-2458d4e5930a

			measure 'Processed Volume (MT)' = CALCULATE( SUM(Production[Value]), Production[Section] = "Steaming")
				formatString: #,0
				lineageTag: a57f07df-46e3-423b-9eea-59710e0307d8

			measure 'RCN Volume (MT)' = [Processed Volume (MT)] / 1000
				formatString: #,0
				lineageTag: 52c41a06-280b-4627-be32-5de4430e206a

			measure 'Section Production Cost' =
					
					DIVIDE( SUM(Production[Value]) , CALCULATE( SUM(Production[Value]) , ALL(Dim_Origin)),0)
					*
					SUM(Finance[Wages & salaries production variable])
				lineageTag: 1f4c7453-1aef-4ac3-8a9d-fa77d5e73440

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure 'Energy & Utilities' =
					
					DIVIDE(
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Energy & Utilities" ),
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Energy & Utilities" , ALL(Dim_Origin)),
					    0
					)
					*
					SUM(Finance[Wages & salaries production variable])
				lineageTag: dedf429a-2d11-4cac-bc91-2d1f29e0330a

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure 'Total sales costs' =
					
					DIVIDE(
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Total sales costs" ),
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Total sales costs" , ALL(Dim_Origin)),
					    0
					)
					*
					SUM(Finance[Wages & salaries production variable])
				lineageTag: 494c9a0a-c89d-48e0-9cbe-2b9f122a892c

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure 'Fixed Production Cost' =
					
					DIVIDE(
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Fixed Production Cost" ),
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Fixed Production Cost" , ALL(Dim_Origin)),
					    0
					)
					*
					SUM(Finance[Wages & salaries production variable])
				lineageTag: 6fb6fa92-a7ea-4448-a37a-713b99af7a72

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure 'Total administration costs' =
					
					DIVIDE(
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Total administration costs" ),
					    CALCULATE( SUM('Production append'[Value]), 'Dim_Section (custom)'[Section] = "Total administration costs" , ALL(Dim_Origin)),
					    0
					)
					*
					SUM(Finance[Wages & salaries production variable])
				lineageTag: a133e83b-7f92-4b45-9243-56fef789a235

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

						    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Source,{{"Column1", type text}})
						in
						    #"Changed Type"

			column WeekDay

			column Day
				formatString: 0

			column 'Day Short'
				lineageTag: 05a9f4cd-ff29-4f51-b1c3-9d3dad0f9612

			column 'Fiscal Year'
				lineageTag: 0e21c907-8203-44c2-ad7f-bf9784504b82
				summarizeBy: none
				isNameInferred
				sourceColumn: [Fiscal Year]

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			column 'Month Fiscal sort'
				formatString: 0
				lineageTag: e8aa77ca-7b9d-4aea-9de4-f36c98789977
				summarizeBy: sum
				isNameInferred
				sourceColumn: [Month Fiscal sort]

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			column 'Working Date'
				lineageTag: 9b08f0c2-7887-4b7b-b4e6-42b807b0742a
				summarizeBy: none
				isNameInferred
				sourceColumn: [Working Date]

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			partition 'Date Auto' = calculated
				mode: import
				source =
						ADDCOLUMNS(
						CALENDARAUTO(),
						"Year", YEAR([Date]),
						"Quarter", "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ),
						"Month", MONTH([Date]),
						"Month Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm" ),
						"Week", FORMAT ( [Date], "ww" ),
						"WeekDay", WEEKDAY([Date]),
						"Day", DAY([Date]),
						"Day Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "ddd" ),
						"Fiscal Year","FY"& IF(MONTH([Date]) <=6, Year([Date]), YEAR([Date])+1),
						"Month Fiscal sort", IF(MONTH([Date]) <=6, MONTH([Date])+6,MONTH([Date])-6),
						"Working Date", IF(WEEKDAY([Date])=1, "No", "Yes")
						)

			annotation PBI_Id = 935bfbb5af1f4015b2ec47f5cda74e28

			partition 'Production append' = calculated
				mode: import
				source =
						
						FILTER(
						    UNION(
						    SELECTCOLUMNS(Production, "Plant", Production[Plant],"Month", Production[Month],"Origin", Production[Origin],
						    "Value",	CALCULATE(SUM(Production[CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's]),Dim_Section[Section]="Steaming"),
						    "Section","Energy & Utilities"),
						    SELECTCOLUMNS(Production, "Plant", Production[Plant],"Month", Production[Month],"Origin", Production[Origin],
						    "Value",	CALCULATE(SUM(Production[CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's]),Dim_Section[Section]="Steaming"),
						    "Section","Fixed Production Cost"),
						    SELECTCOLUMNS(Production, "Plant", Production[Plant],"Month", Production[Month],"Origin", Production[Origin],
						    "Value",	CALCULATE(SUM(Production[CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's]),Dim_Section[Section]="MC Shelling"),
						    "Section","Total sales costs"),
						    SELECTCOLUMNS(Production, "Plant", Production[Plant],"Month", Production[Month],"Origin", Production[Origin],
						    "Value",	CALCULATE(SUM(Production[CK Conversion -> RCN Kg's]),Dim_Section[Section]="Borma"),
						    "Section","Total administration costs")
						), [Value] <> blank()
						)
